---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "My papers and publications"
css: files/publications/pub-listing.css
filters: [files/publications/remove-stray-divfence.lua]
listing:
  - id: pubs
    contents: files/publications/publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 200
    template: files/publications/pub-listing.ejs
---

{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

:::{#pubs}
:::
